fixit_hint: To adapt row to matrix, write `&matrix + row`.
fixit_policy: To adapt row to matrix, write `&matrix + row`.
message: In the current profile, `&` in NumericArray contextual operations marks the context-providing anchor operand, not the adapted operand. Use `&matrix + row`, not `matrix + &row`.
notes: Current diagnostic contract; product execution remains NOT_RUN.

fixit_hint: Use +, -, or # for a callable nested in a type; remove a visibility word from a nested local function.
fixit_policy: do not rewrite a top-level callable, where public/common/private are admitted and omission defaults to private
message: Member callables use +, -, or # visibility, and nested local functions have lexical visibility; public/common/private are top-level-only callable visibility words.
notes: Scoped to member and nested-local callable owners. Top-level callable visibility follows TopLevelVisibility and is not rejected by this diagnostic. Product execution remains NOT_RUN.
